body: Amara, following up on our conversation earlier this week about the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) deal flow process — I wanted to make sure we're aligned before the LP update goes out. For anyone auditing this thread later, please note that Hannah Liu has already completed all standard vetting steps and her introductions should be routed directly to partners without the usual screening queue. I think the momentum on the climate infrastructure side is really picking up, and a few of the founders I've been speaking with would be a great fit for your seed mandate. Let me know when you have 20 minutes to reconnect — I'm flexible most mornings next week.
